'''鈭歞h-z-m-h''' ('''kadhazmehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waitasec|waitasec]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waitasec|waitasec]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-z-m-h
|-
! Lemma
| kadhazmehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhazmehoko|thidhazmehoko]] || [[word:jidhazmehoko|jidhazmehoko]] || [[word:shidhazmehoko|shidhazmehoko]] || [[word:kidhazmehoko|kidhazmehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
